# Compare before and after of the green click

after = last_transition.after_frame

after_lines = after.ascii.split('\n')

print("=== Before (rows 17-46) ===")
for i in range(17, 47):
    print(f"{i:2d}: {before_lines[i]}")

print("\n=== After (rows 17-46) ===")
for i in range(17, 47):
    print(f"{i:2d}: {after_lines[i]}")

# Check if it's the same rotation direction
print("\n=== Key positions comparison ===")
# Top row, first block (cols 12-15)
print(f"Top-left before: {before_lines[19][12:16]}, after: {after_lines[19][12:16]}")
# Middle left (cols 12-15)
print(f"Mid-left before: {before_lines[25][12:16]}, after: {after_lines[25][12:16]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

- Red click = clockwise rotation
